'''shanoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whammy|whammy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whammy|whammy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shanoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæneketh|shæneketh]] || [[word:shænekej|shænekej]] || [[word:shænekesh|shænekesh]] || [[word:shæneke|shæneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanonokoth|shanonokoth]] || [[word:shanonokoj|shanonokoj]] || [[word:shanonokosh|shanonokosh]] || [[word:shanonoko|shanonoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanokoth|shanokoth]] || [[word:shanokoj|shanokoj]] || [[word:shanokosh|shanokosh]] || [[word:shanoko|shanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanofkoth|shanofkoth]] || [[word:shanofkoj|shanofkoj]] || [[word:shanofkosh|shanofkosh]] || [[word:shanofkof|shanofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanokotho|shanokotho]] || [[word:shanokojo|shanokojo]] || [[word:shanokosho|shanokosho]] || [[word:shanokoko|shanokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanokoth|shanokoth]] || [[word:shanokoj|shanokoj]] || [[word:shanokosh|shanokosh]] || [[word:shanoko|shanoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanokothol|shanokothol]] || [[word:shanokojol|shanokojol]] || [[word:shanokoshol|shanokoshol]] || [[word:shanokokol|shanokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanokothotho|shanokothotho]] || [[word:shanokojojo|shanokojojo]] || [[word:shanokoshosho|shanokoshosho]] || [[word:shanokoko|shanokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanokothon|shanokothon]] || [[word:shanokojon|shanokojon]] || [[word:shanokoshon|shanokoshon]] || [[word:shanokokon|shanokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanokothoro|shanokothoro]] || [[word:shanokojoro|shanokojoro]] || [[word:shanokoshoro|shanokoshoro]] || [[word:shanokokoro|shanokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
